name: Anchor Nigerian Banking-as-a-Service (BaaS) API
what_it_does: Anchor Nigerian banking-as-a-service REST API for Nigerian fintech developers, startups, and enterprises to embed banking functionality into their products — enabling programmatic bank account creation, payment processing, card issuance, and financial services through Anchor's CBN-licensed BaaS infrastructure without needing to obtain independent banking licenses. Enables AI agents to manage account creation for embedded Nigerian banking automation, handle payment processing for NIP/NIBSS transfer automation, access card issuance for virtual and physical Nigerian card automation, retrieve transaction history for embedded banking statement automation, manage sub-account for product-level financial segregation automation, handle webhook for banking event notification automation, access KYC verification for BVN/NIN consumer identity automation, retrieve wallet for embedded wallet product automation, manage deposit for savings product automation, and integrate Anchor with Nigerian fintech, neobank, and embedded finance applications for programmatic banking infrastructure automation.
use_cases: Building Nigerian neobank and digital banking products using Anchor BaaS infrastructure for fintech automation agents
Creating embedded banking accounts within Nigerian marketplace and e-commerce platforms for seller banking automation agents
Issuing virtual and physical debit cards to Nigerian consumers through Anchor BaaS for card product automation agents
Processing Nigerian bank transfers and payments for embedded finance platform automation agents
not_for: Non-Nigerian markets (Anchor is Nigeria-specific BaaS platform)
Direct consumer banking without building a product (Anchor is infrastructure for other fintechs to build on)
Enterprise corporate banking (Anchor targets fintech builders, not direct large corporate banking)
best_when: A Nigerian fintech developer, startup, or enterprise wanting AI agents to build embedded banking products — neobanks, wallet features, card programs — using Anchor's CBN-licensed banking infrastructure without obtaining independent banking licenses.
avoid_when: CBN AND FINTECH LICENSING: Anchor operates under CBN's regulatory framework; automated non-CBN-compliant product building assumption creates regulatory violation; automated products built on Anchor must comply with CBN guidelines for their specific use case. ANCHOR IS INFRASTRUCTURE NOT CONSUMER BANK: Anchor provides BaaS infrastructure for other fintechs; automated building end-consumer banking product assumption requires separate regulatory compliance for the consumer-facing layer; automated must understand regulatory requirements for product layer on top of Anchor. KYC IS MANDATORY: Anchor requires BVN and/or NIN verification for account holders; automated KYC-optional account creation assumption creates unverified_account with restricted functionality; automated must implement BVN/NIN KYC for full-featured accounts. PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Anchor BaaS requires enterprise partnership agreement; automated self-service API access assumption creates pending_partnership state.

auth.notes: Anchor uses API key (secret key) for authentication. REST API with JSON. Lagos, Nigeria HQ. Founded 2021 by Seun Abiose, Chioma Okeke, and Olamide Abiose. Products: Bank account creation, NIP payments, virtual/physical card issuance, KYC (BVN/NIN), webhooks, sub-accounts, wallet, savings. SDKs: JS, Python. CBN licensed via microfinance bank. Backed by investors including Sequoia Africa, Andreessen Horowitz, Y Combinator. Competes with Sudo Africa for Nigerian BaaS infrastructure.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox with test accounts; production requires Anchor partnership agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-account created fees; per-transaction fees; card issuance fees; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Lagos NG. CBN via MFB. Per-account + per-transaction. Nigerian BaaS infrastructure. Fintech builder focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; account creation and payment APIs throttled per partner tier

known_agent_gotchas: BVN/NIN KYC IS REQUIRED FOR FULL ACCOUNTS: Anchor requires BVN (Bank Verification Number) or NIN (National Identification Number) for full-featured account creation; automated KYC-optional assumption creates restricted_account with limited transaction capability; automated must implement BVN/NIN verification in account creation flow

SANDBOX IS TEST-ONLY: Anchor sandbox accounts and transactions are completely separate from production; automated sandbox-to-production credential sharing assumption creates authentication_failed; automated must provision separate production credentials after partnership onboarding

WEBHOOK SIGNATURES MUST BE VERIFIED: Anchor webhooks include HMAC signature for verification; automated unverified webhook assumption creates security vulnerability; automated must verify webhook HMAC signature before processing payment events

ACCOUNT NUMBERS ARE NIGERIAN FORMAT: Anchor generates 10-digit NUBAN (Nigerian Uniform Bank Account Number) account numbers; automated non-standard format assumption creates routing issues; automated must handle NUBAN format for NIP transfers to Anchor accounts

CARD PROGRAM REQUIRES SEPARATE ACTIVATION: Card issuance (virtual/physical) is a separate Anchor product requiring additional activation; automated unified BaaS-includes-cards assumption creates feature_not_enabled; automated must activate card program separately
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nigerian BaaS infrastructure. CBN, NFIU, NDPR. API key. Nigeria. Bank account creation and payment infrastructure data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Nigerian BaaS. CBN, NFIU. API key. Nigeria. Banking infrastructure and financial data.
